hooks.command: EDITED_FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && case "$EDITED_FILE" in *.env*|*credentials*|*secrets*|*.pem|*.key|*.p12) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Sensitive file detected. Confirm with user before writing."}' ;; *) ;; esac

EDITED_FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$EDITED_FILE" in */scoring/*) echo 'SCORING LOGIC EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Before continuing, verify:' && echo '  1. All constants come from scoringConstants.ts (no magic numbers)' && echo '  2. Formula matches AGENTS.md Section 5 exactly' && echo '  3. clamp applied correctly (0-100 range)' && echo '  4. Corresponding test updated in tests/unit/scoring/' && echo '  5. Pure function - no side effects, no state access' ;; */types/*) echo 'TYPE DEFINITION EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Data contract change detected. Verify:' && echo '  1. Change approved per AGENTS.md Section 4' && echo '  2. Master plan updated if interface shape changed' && echo '  3. All consumers updated to match' ;; */stores/*) echo 'STORE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. localStorage persistence still works' && echo '  2. No derived state stored - compute from source data' && echo '  3. Zustand middleware chain intact' ;; *) ;; esac

echo '=== SESSION END CHECK ===' && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null) && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ] || [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then echo 'UNCOMMITTED CHANGES DETECTED:' && echo "$CHANGED" && echo "$STAGED" && echo '' && DOCS_TOUCHED=false && echo "$CHANGED $STAGED" | grep -q 'docs/' && DOCS_TOUCHED=true; if [ "$DOCS_TOUCHED" = false ]; then echo 'WARNING: Files changed but docs/ not updated.' && echo 'Consider updating: status.md, versions.md'; fi; else echo 'No uncommitted changes.'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END — MEMORY REVIEW: Check ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-engineering-effectiveness/memory/MEMORY.md first to avoid duplicates. Save corrections, confirmed approaches (with WHY), project decisions driven by external factors. NOT worth saving: anything derivable from code, debugging solutions, ephemeral details, things already in AGENTS.md."}'
